description: End of a legal document. Dated: middle decade of Elul 1440 Seleucid = August/September 1129 CE, under the authority of Maṣliaḥ Gaon. Involves Yehuda ha-Zaqen. Signed by [...] b. Netanel ha-Levi. The addendum (validation?) mentions the names of the witnesses Ahuv b. Yeshuʿa and Natan b. Shelomo ha-Kohen and is signed by Natan b. Shemuel he-Ḥaver (ZL) and Ḥiyya b. Yiṣḥaq.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בבודליאן אוקספורד.
